heading: Opinions of Attorney General
label: 505 Opinions of Attorney General
text: The Secretary may require the opinion of the Attorney General on any question of law arising in the administration of the Department.
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 505 to 508 were renumbered sections 1505 to 1508 of this title, respectively.Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 211(b) of this titlePub. L. 102–83, § 2(a)
